questionHtml:
How many grams of sodium azide, NaN3, are needed to produce 68.1 dm3 of N2 (g) at STP?

Molar volume at STP = 22.7 dm3 mol–1; Mr(NaN3) = 65.0

2NaN3 (s) → 3N2 (g) + 2Na (s)

A. 32.5

B. 65.0

C. 130.0

D. 195.0

meta.title: How many grams of sodium azide, NaN3, are needed to produce 68.1 dm3 of N2 (g) at STP? Molar volume at STP = 22.7 dm3 mol–1; Mr(NaN3) = 65.0 2NaN3 (s) → 3N2 (g) + 2Na (s) A. 32.5 B
